com.hp.workpath.api.printer

Class PrintAttributes

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.hp.workpath.api.printer.PrintAttributes
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    android.os.Parcelable

    public class PrintAttributes
extends java.lang.Object
implements android.os.Parcelable
    The sets of attributes for requesting a print. An instance of this class is created using one of the builders.
    Since:
    API 1

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      static class  PrintAttributes.AutoFit
      A collection of the configuration of auto fit
      static class  PrintAttributes.CollateMode
      A collection of Collate
      static class  PrintAttributes.ColorMode
      A collection of the color mode for printing.
      static class  PrintAttributes.DocumentFormat
      A collection of Document Format
      static class  PrintAttributes.Duplex
      A collection of duplex mode for printing.
      static class  PrintAttributes.Finishings
      A collection of finishings
      static class  PrintAttributes.Orientation
      A collection of Orientation
      static class  PrintAttributes.OutputBin
      A collection of OutputBin
      static class  PrintAttributes.PaperSize
      A collection of Paper Size
      static class  PrintAttributes.PaperSource
      A collection of Paper Source
      static class  PrintAttributes.PaperType
      A collection of Paper Type
      static class  PrintAttributes.PrintCommonAttributesBuilder<T extends PrintAttributes.PrintCommonAttributesBuilder<T>>
      Base builder for common print attributes
      static class  PrintAttributes.PrintFromHttpBuilder
      Builder for creating PrintAttributes to request using an image residing on the external server and available by HTTP(S) URL.
      static class  PrintAttributes.PrintFromStorageBuilder
      Builder for creating PrintAttributes to print the files from source.
      static class  PrintAttributes.PrintFromStreamBuilder
      Builder for creating PrintAttributes to request using an data from provided input stream.
      static class  PrintAttributes.PrintFromUsbBuilder
      Builder for creating PrintAttributes to request using an file residing on the external USB storage.
      static class  PrintAttributes.PrintQuality
      A collection of Print-quality (IPP values - draft: 3, Normal: 4, High: 5)
      static class  PrintAttributes.Source
      The source for file to print.
      static class  PrintAttributes.StapleMode
      A collection of Staple Mode, this option will be ignored if Finishings option is enabled
